overview.description: Manage your autonomous agent infrastructure and multi-channel workflows.
overview.pro_tip_text: Use the Canvas to orchestrate agents across multiple channels.
overview.pro_tip_shortcut: ⌘K to search · / to focus search · ? for all shortcuts · g then letter to navigate
overview.setup_description: No configuration file detected. Click to auto-detect your LLM provider and generate a default config.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Active autonomous units managed by the LibreFang kernel.
agents.thinking_toml_hint: Add a [thinking] section in TOML to enable extended thinking
agents.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete agent "{{name}}"?
agents.thinking_hint: Extended thinking lets the model reason deeply before answering
agents.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset this agent's session? Chat history will be cleared.
agents.help: Manage all agents in the system. Create, suspend, resume, and delete agents. View their status and configuration.

academic-researcher.name: Academic Researcher
academic-researcher.description: Academic research agent. Searches scholarly papers, summarizes findings, and generates literature reviews.

analyst.name: Analyst
analyst.description: Data analyst. Processes data, generates insights, creates reports.

architect.name: Architect
architect.description: System architect. Designs software architectures, evaluates trade-offs, creates technical specifications.

assistant.name: Assistant
assistant.description: General-purpose assistant agent. The default agent for everyday tasks, questions, and conversations.

code-reviewer.name: Code Reviewer
code-reviewer.description: Senior code reviewer. Reviews PRs, identifies issues, suggests improvements with production standards.

coder.name: Coder
coder.description: Expert software engineer. Reads, writes, and analyzes code.

customer-support.name: Customer Support
customer-support.description: Customer support agent for ticket handling, issue resolution, and customer communication.

data-scientist.name: Data Scientist
data-scientist.description: Data scientist. Analyzes datasets, builds models, creates visualizations, performs statistical analysis.

debugger.name: Debugger
debugger.description: Expert debugger. Traces bugs, analyzes stack traces, performs root cause analysis.

devops-lead.name: DevOps Lead
devops-lead.description: DevOps lead. Manages CI/CD, infrastructure, deployments, monitoring, and incident response.

doc-writer.name: Doc Writer
doc-writer.description: Technical writer. Creates documentation, README files, API docs, tutorials, and architecture guides.

email-assistant.name: Email Assistant
email-assistant.description: Email triage, drafting, scheduling, and inbox management agent.

hello-world.name: Hello World
hello-world.description: A friendly greeting agent that can read files, search the web, and answer everyday questions.

home-automation.name: Home Automation
home-automation.description: Smart home control agent for IoT device management, automation rules, and home monitoring.

legal-assistant.name: Legal Assistant
legal-assistant.description: Legal assistant agent for contract review, legal research, compliance checking, and document drafting.

meeting-assistant.name: Meeting Assistant
meeting-assistant.description: Meeting notes, action items, agenda preparation, and follow-up tracking agent.

ops.name: Ops
ops.description: DevOps agent. Monitors systems, runs diagnostics, manages deployments.

orchestrator.name: Orchestrator
orchestrator.description: Meta-agent that decomposes complex tasks, delegates to specialist agents, and synthesizes results.

personal-finance.name: Personal Finance
personal-finance.description: Personal finance agent for budget tracking, expense analysis, savings goals, and financial planning.

planner.name: Planner
planner.description: Project planner. Creates project plans, breaks down epics, estimates effort, identifies risks and dependencies.

recipe-assistant.name: Recipe Assistant
recipe-assistant.description: Cooking assistant that helps with recipes, meal plans, ingredient substitutions, and portion adjustments.

recruiter.name: Recruiter
recruiter.description: Recruiting agent for resume screening, candidate outreach, job description writing, and hiring pipeline management.

researcher.name: Researcher
researcher.description: Research agent. Fetches web content and synthesizes information.

sales-assistant.name: Sales Assistant
sales-assistant.description: Sales assistant agent for CRM updates, outreach drafting, pipeline management, and deal tracking.

security-auditor.name: Security Auditor
security-auditor.description: Security specialist. Reviews code for vulnerabilities, checks configurations, performs threat modeling.

social-media.name: Social Media
social-media.description: Social media content creation, scheduling, and engagement strategy agent.

test-engineer.name: Test Engineer
test-engineer.description: Quality assurance engineer. Designs test strategies, writes tests, validates correctness.

translator.name: Translator
translator.description: Multi-language translation agent for document translation, localization, and cross-cultural communication.

travel-planner.name: Travel Planner
travel-planner.description: Trip planning agent for itinerary creation, booking research, budget estimation, and travel logistics.

tutor.name: Tutor
tutor.description: Teaching and explanation agent for learning, tutoring, and educational content creation.

writer.name: Writer
writer.description: Content writer. Creates documentation, articles, and technical writing.

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Manage LLM API connections and health.
providers.name: Name
providers.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to remove the API key for this provider? The provider will become unconfigured.
providers.help: Manage LLM provider connections. Test connectivity, configure API keys, and monitor provider health status.

channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Messaging adapters and integration gateways.
channels.name: Name
channels.help: Configure messaging adapters and integration gateways. Set up channels like Slack, Discord, Telegram, and more.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Atomic capabilities that extend agent reasoning.
skills.author: Author
skills.uninstall_confirm: Are you sure you want to uninstall "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
skills.rate_limited_desc: ClawHub API rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
skills.help: Browse and install skills to extend agent capabilities. Manage installed skills and discover new ones from the marketplace.
skills.skillhub_rate_limited_desc: SkillHub rate limit reached. Please try again later.

hands.title: Hands
hands.subtitle: Autonomous capability packages.
hands.no_matching_hint: Try a different search term or clear the active filters.
hands.help: Manage autonomous capability packages. Activate, deactivate, pause, and resume Hands to extend agent functionality.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Usage statistics and performance telemetry.
analytics.budget_desc: Set spending caps to control costs.
analytics.help: View usage statistics and cost analytics. Monitor API calls, token consumption, and set budget limits to control spending.

memory.title: Memory
memory.subtitle: Persistent vector storage for agent context.
memory.config_desc: Changes are written to config.toml. Restart required for full effect.
memory.help: Manage agent memory storage. Add, edit, search, and delete memories. Configure embedding and proactive memory settings.

comms.subtitle: Real-time message traffic and connectivity.
comms.help: Monitor the communication bus. View channel connectivity, agent network topology, and real-time message events.

canvas.title: Designer
canvas.subtitle: Design visual logic flows for autonomous agent behavior.
canvas.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear the canvas?
canvas.no_agent_steps: No nodes with assigned agents. Click a node to assign an agent.
canvas.run_input_hint: Enter input for the first step (passed as {{input}}). Leave empty to run without input.
canvas.empty_hint: Add nodes from the sidebar or right-click to add

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.subtitle: Automation hub.
workflows.select_workflow_hint: Select a workflow to view runs
workflows.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this workflow?
workflows.help: Create and manage automation workflows. Use templates or build from scratch with the visual canvas editor.
workflows.empty_desc: Create your first workflow from a template or start from scratch.

template_details.content_pipeline_desc: Research → Write → Edit, produce polished articles
template_details.brainstorm_desc: Generate ideas → Evaluate → Create action plan
template_details.weekly_report_desc: Turn messy notes into professional weekly reports

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.subtitle: Manage cron jobs and scheduled tasks.
scheduler.no_schedules: No schedules yet. Create one to automate agent tasks.
scheduler.help: Schedule automated tasks with cron expressions. Create, run, and delete scheduled jobs that trigger agent actions.

runtime.title: Runtime
runtime.subtitle: Engine status and resource management.
runtime.shutdown_confirm_desc: The server will stop and the dashboard will become unavailable.
runtime.help: View engine status, system health, task queues, and resource usage. Reload configuration or shut down the server.
runtime.restore_success: Restore complete. Restart daemon for changes.

telemetry.title: Telemetry
telemetry.subtitle: System metrics, LLM usage, and HTTP observability.
telemetry.help: Monitor system metrics, LLM token usage, and HTTP request observability. View per-agent breakdowns and raw Prometheus data.
telemetry.no_data: No telemetry data yet. Make some API requests to see metrics.

logs.title: Logs
logs.subtitle: Real-time diagnostic events.
logs.help: View real-time diagnostic logs. Filter by module, search log content, and export logs as JSON for analysis.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: System parameters.
settings.theme_desc: Switch between light and dark mode
settings.username_too_short: Username must be at least 2 characters
settings.pw_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
settings.totp_desc: Require authenticator app code when approving critical tool executions
settings.totp_scan: Scan the QR code or enter the secret in your authenticator app:
settings.totp_no_recovery: No recovery codes remaining. Reset TOTP to generate new ones.
settings.help: Configure system preferences. Switch theme, language, navigation layout, and browse available tools.

chat.title: Chat
chat.select_agent_desc: Choose an agent from the list to establish a communication link.
chat.send_hint: Enter to send, Cmd+Enter for newline
chat.auth_missing: API key for provider "{{provider}}" is not configured. Please set it in Settings > Providers before chatting.
chat.model_update_failed: Failed to update model. Please try again.

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Strategic planning and task tracking.
goals.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this goal?
goals.pick_template_desc: Pick a template to get started quickly with pre-defined goals.
goals.help: Set strategic goals and track progress. Create goal hierarchies, apply templates, and monitor completion status.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Active agent conversations and historical execution contexts.
sessions.empty_desc: Sessions will appear when agents start conversations.
sessions.help: View and manage agent conversation sessions. Switch active sessions, delete old ones, and monitor session activity.

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.subtitle: Review and authorize critical agent actions.
approvals.totpRequired: TOTP code required. Use the Approvals page.
approvals.help: Review approval requests. When agents need human confirmation, requests appear here.
approvals.modifyPlaceholder: Provide feedback for the agent to retry with...
approvals.loadError: Failed to load approvals. Check your connection.

models.title: Model Catalog
models.subtitle: Browse all available LLM models across providers.
models.no_models: No models loaded. Is the daemon running?
models.load_error: Failed to load models. Check if the daemon is running.
models.help: Browse all available LLM models across providers. Filter by tier, provider, and availability. Compare capabilities and pricing.

media.title: Media Generation
media.subtitle: Generate images, speech, videos, and music through configured providers.
media.help: All media endpoints share the same provider abstraction. If no provider is selected, the backend picks the first configured driver for the chosen capability.
media.video_desc: Video generation is asynchronous — the result is polled after submission.
media.video_polling: Task in progress, polling every 5 seconds...
media.music_desc: Compose music from a style prompt or lyrics.
media.no_provider_image: No provider configured for image generation
media.no_provider_video: No provider configured for video generation
media.no_provider_music: No provider configured for music generation

auth.title: API Key Required
auth.description: This instance requires authentication to access.
auth.credentials_description: Enter your dashboard username and password to continue.
auth.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please try again.
auth.invalid_credentials: Invalid username or password. Please try again.

network.title: Network
network.subtitle: Open Federation Protocol network status and connected peers.
network.no_peers_desc: No OFP peers are currently connected to this node.
network.help: View the Open Federation Protocol network status. Monitor connected peers, node identity, and protocol version.

a2a.title: A2A
a2a.subtitle: Discover and communicate with external A2A agents.
a2a.no_agents_desc: Discover A2A agents by entering their URL.
a2a.task_placeholder: Describe the task for this agent...
a2a.help: Discover and interact with external A2A agents. Send tasks to remote agents and track their execution status.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Extend agent capabilities with custom plugins.
plugins.no_plugins_desc: Install plugins from the marketplace or create your own.
plugins.help: Install and manage plugins to extend agent capabilities. Add plugins from the marketplace, local paths, or Git repositories.

schema_form.required_missing: Please fill in all required fields

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.subtitle: Manage Model Context Protocol server connections
mcp.empty_desc: Add an MCP server to extend agent capabilities with external tools.
mcp.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this MCP server? This action cannot be undone.
mcp.name: Name
mcp.help:
MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers extend your agents with external tools and capabilities.

Supported transports:
- stdio: Run a local command (e.g. npx, python)
- SSE: Connect via Server-Sent Events
- HTTP: Connect via HTTP Streamable
